svg.title: BouncyBot complete strategy overview
svg.desc: GitHub dark-mode infographic showing BouncyBot's five-stage IBKR trading cycle, example price path, ATR defaults, position sizing, entry guards, architecture, execution, recovery, and limitations.
svg.text: One confirmed STK / USD / SMART contract • long-only • whole shares • RTH-only order submission

text.tspan: a usable price sets the anchor.
At the drop, submit a native BUY
TRAIL. Its stop follows new lows.
A 0% trail submits a market BUY.
The actual average BUY fill is the
final SELL can start with its stop
Submit a native SELL TRAIL for the
A 0% trail submits a market SELL.

svg.text: STOP IS NOT A FILL GUARANTEE
LOSSES DO NOT CUT BASE BUDGET
Native TRAIL orders trigger market-style execution.
Each result is clamped to 0.10%–20.00%. Default entry waits for ATR readiness.
Optional slippage sizing buffer is OFF by default; IBKR what-if preflight is ON.
Before a BUY can be sent
Local API socket + upstream IBKR link
Qualified contract and valid minimum tick
Open RTH and allowed session window
Fresh selected price, bid, ask, and RTH status
Confirmed live data for live trading mode
ATR ready when the default blocker is enabled
No unsold app-owned quantity in the fill ledger
THE FIRST BLOCKER PAUSES ENTRY — IT DOES NOT GUESS
GUI renders state; the controller owns broker side effects.

text.tspan: App-created orders use an ownership prefix.
Any positive fill is managed; the remainder is cancelled.
Unsold shares come from persisted app fills,
not from the total account position.
Freshness is invalidated; orders and executions
A stored active cycle requires explicit
Order IDs, fills, commissions, P&L, and UTC

svg.text: Manual 2% / 1% / 3% / 1% values are fallback settings; default ATR readiness rewrites the order-driving percentages.
WHAT THIS BOT IS — AND IS NOT
One operator-selected and qualified stock contract
Long-only, whole shares, one active cycle
Not a market scanner or security-selection engine
No default protective stop-loss or time exit
Stops and min-profit levels do not guarantee fills
IBKR is authoritative for accepted orders and fills
SOFTWARE BEHAVIOR OVERVIEW — NOT INVESTMENT ADVICE
BouncyBot v3.0.13 • source-aligned overview of StrategySettings, StrategyEngine, TradingController, IbAsyncTwsAdapter, and SQLite persistence
